---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Larnix — learn AI/ML by building it, in your browser"
toc: false
section-divs: false
anchor-sections: false
page-layout: full
---

::: {.lx-landing}

::: {.lx-hero}
[✦ Free forever · runs in your browser · no signup]{.lx-eyebrow .lx-reveal .lx-reveal-1}

# [Learn how AI works —]{} [by building it.]{.lx-pop} {.lx-reveal .lx-reveal-2}

::: {.lx-lead .lx-reveal .lx-reveal-3}
Most courses *explain* AI. Larnix has you **build** it. Train your first model in
the next twenty minutes — right here in this browser tab — and keep going, one
idea at a time, until you've built your own language model. No setup, no fees, no
maths-degree required.
:::

::: {.lx-cta .lx-reveal .lx-reveal-4}
[Train your first model ▸](modules/00-orientation/ch01-train-your-first-model.qmd){.btn-clay}
[See the full journey](https://github.com/venkathub/larnix/blob/main/docs/ROADMAP.md){.btn-clay .btn-clay--ghost}
:::
:::

## The journey: zero to frontier {.lx-section}

::: {.lx-sub}
Seventeen modules carry you from "what is AI" to building and shipping real
systems. Each chapter is short, plain-spoken, and runnable. Begin at M0 today —
the rest unlock as the curriculum grows.
:::

::: {.lx-grid .lx-grid--3}

::: {.lx-course .lx-tile .clay--teal}
::: {.lx-course-top}
[M0]{.lx-coursenum}

### Orientation
:::
Train a real model in twenty minutes: load data, fit a classifier, and watch it
sort flowers it has never seen. Your first taste of the whole loop.
[🟢 Beginner]{.lx-pill} [▸ Available]{.lx-pill}
:::

::: {.lx-course .lx-tile .clay--amber .lx-course--soon}
::: {.lx-course-top}
[M1]{.lx-coursenum}

### Foundations
:::
The maths and Python you actually need — vectors, probability, clean code — built
from zero, with intuition first and symbols second.
[🟢 Beginner]{.lx-pill} [Soon]{.lx-pill}
:::

::: {.lx-course .lx-tile .clay--coral .lx-course--soon}
::: {.lx-course-top}
[M4]{.lx-coursenum}

### Classical ML
:::
The workhorses behind real products — regression, trees, ensembles — and the
honest question every practitioner asks: did it actually learn?
[🟡 Intermediate]{.lx-pill} [Soon]{.lx-pill}
:::

::: {.lx-course .lx-tile .clay--violet .lx-course--soon}
::: {.lx-course-top}
[M7]{.lx-coursenum}

### Transformers & LLMs
:::
Ever wondered what is inside a chatbot like ChatGPT? Build the attention
mechanism and the transformer yourself, step by step — nothing hand-waved.
[🔴 Advanced]{.lx-pill} [Soon]{.lx-pill}
:::

::: {.lx-course .lx-tile .clay--sky .lx-course--soon}
::: {.lx-course-top}
[M11]{.lx-coursenum}

### Build your own LLM
:::
The headline capstone: pretrain a small language model end to end, on a free GPU.
The thing experts do — you will do it too.
[🔴 Advanced]{.lx-pill} [Soon]{.lx-pill}
:::

::: {.lx-course .lx-tile .clay--mint .lx-course--soon}
::: {.lx-course-top}
[M16]{.lx-coursenum}

### Career-ready
:::
Turn what you built into a career — portfolio projects, production MLOps, and
interview practice that hiring managers respect.
[🟡 Intermediate]{.lx-pill} [Soon]{.lx-pill}
:::

:::

::: {.lx-cta-band}
## Your first model is twenty minutes away.
It runs in this browser tab, costs nothing, and needs no account. Curious what you
can build? There is only one way to find out.

[Start Chapter 1 ▸](modules/00-orientation/ch01-train-your-first-model.qmd){.btn-clay .btn-clay--ghost}
:::

:::
